name: MAST Oceanheart Needle Cartridge – 0.20mm 1RL
shortDescription: Sterile, individually packaged premium needle cartridge with 0.20 mm needle thickness, 1RL (Round Liner) configuration. The finest needle size – perfect for ultra-precise eyeliner.
description:
The MAST Oceanheart needle cartridge is an essential accessory for precise permanent makeup and body tattooing. Made from high-quality materials, in strictly sterile, individually packaged form.

The 0.20 mm needle thickness is the finest available size, and with the 1RL (Round Liner) configuration, it enables the most precise work possible. Perfect for ultra-fine eyeliner, detailed hair-strokes, and micro line work. The transparent housing allows monitoring of pigment flow during work.

Compatible with most universal tattoo machines – especially recommended for MAST and Dragonhawk machines.

faq.question: What techniques is the 0.20mm 1RL needle cartridge ideal for?
faq.answer: The 0.20 mm is the finest available needle thickness, ideal for ultra-precise eyeliner, extremely thin hair-strokes, and working out micro details. Recommended for experienced artists who seek maximum fineness.

faq.question: Is the needle cartridge sterile, and how many times can it be used?
faq.answer: Yes, every needle cartridge arrives in sterile, individually packaged form with ISO certification. Needle cartridges are single-use – for hygienic reasons, a new cartridge must be used for each treatment.

faq.question: Which machines is the Oceanheart needle cartridge compatible with?
faq.answer: Oceanheart needle cartridges work with a universal cartridge system, making them compatible with most standard tattoo machines. Especially recommended for MAST (P60, Nano 2, Y22 Pro) and Dragonhawk machines.
